allow: Bash(mvn -f services/pom.xml -pl common clean install -DskipTests 2>&1 | tail -30)
Bash(mvn -f services/pom.xml -pl common clean install -DskipTests 2>&1 | tail -20)
Bash(mvn -f services/pom.xml -pl common clean install -DskipTests 2>&1 | tail -15)
Bash(curl -s http://localhost:8097/actuator/health 2>&1 || echo "Service not running or no actuator")
Bash(curl -s http://localhost:8081/actuator/gateway/routes 2>&1 | grep -i oss || echo "No OSS route found")
Bash(curl -s "http://localhost:8848/nacos/v1/cs/configs?dataId=dianping-backend.yml&group=DEFAULT_GROUP" 2>&1 | grep -A10 "oss:" || echo "OSS config not found in Nacos")
Bash(mvn -f services/pom.xml clean install -DskipTests -pl common,post-service -am 2>&1 | tail -20)
Bash(mvn -f services/pom.xml clean install -DskipTests -pl common,post-service -am 2>&1 | tail -10)
Bash(mvn -f services/pom.xml clean install -DskipTests -pl common,post-service -am 2>&1 | tail -15)
